description: Vertical graphic. The top half is a photograph of President Trump in a navy suit and red tie, clapping, on a stage inside a steel mill or industrial facility (coils of steel and an overhead crane visible at right); behind him is a crowd of workers in orange high-visibility gear and hard hats, and large blue banners read 'THE GOLDEN AGE' and 'AMERICA'. Across the middle, in a mix of italic serif and bold serif white type, is the text 'Enforcing THE LAW!'. The lower half is a white inset panel reproducing a 'Bloomberg Law' article excerpt (the Bloomberg Law logo shown as a black tab): the text states the US Labor Department is enforcing temporary-worker rules as the Trump administration raises fees and oversight for employers of visa holders, putting companies on notice to comply or risk being blocked; that attorneys say the initiative, dubbed 'Project Firewall' by Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, marks a posture change for the DOL and other agencies in the immigration ecosystem; and that companies using the H-1B program to recruit foreign workers, such as Amazon, Microsoft, Wal-Mart, and Meta, are expected to see new compliance investigations, with rulebreakers facing fines and disbarment from the specialty-occupation visa program.
notable_text: THE GOLDEN AGE; AMERICA; Enforcing THE LAW!; Bloomberg Law; 'Project Firewall' by Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer; companies like Amazon, Microsoft, Wal-Mart, and Meta expected to see new compliance investigations
